steps.title: Identify the pronoun need
steps.content: The blank modifies compelling narrative, so it must be possessive. The pronoun refers to The Aeneid, a singular work, so the form must be singular and possessive.

steps.title: Avoid contractions and plurals
steps.content: A is plural, while B and D are contractions meaning they are and it is, not possessives. The singular possessive pronoun fits. The answer is C.
